case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. ANTANIO T DUPREE

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUPREE, ANTANIO T THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 ESSEX STREET #714, CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
